description: Style NoteWith the bold prints on this classic graphic tee, adidas brings in sport style with a bang this spring. A sharp add to an off-duty wardrobe, balance this T-shirt with a tiny shorts or fitted denims. An effortless way to infuse a sport-inspired lifestyle into your everyday wear, this tee is worth the buy, especially because it's from favourite sportswear brand adidas!Product DetailsGrey round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves and graphic print on the frontMaterial and Care100% cottonWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoSize and Fit Regular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
